scripts.build:release: VERSION=${VERSION:-v$(date -u +%Y.%m.%d)+$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo local)} BUILD_DATE=${BUILD_DATE:-$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)} GIT_COMMIT_SHORT=${GIT_COMMIT_SHORT:-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo local)} npm run build
scripts.build:release:zip: npm run build:release && LATEST=$(find . -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'dist-*' | sed 's#^./##' | sort | tail -n 1) && rm -f ${LATEST}.zip && /usr/bin/zip -qry ${LATEST}.zip ${LATEST} && echo ${LATEST}.zip
scripts.build:release:archive: npm run build:release:zip && mkdir -p releases && LATEST_DIR=$(find . -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'dist-*' | sed 's#^./##' | sort | tail -n 1) && LATEST_ZIP=$(find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -name 'dist-*.zip' | sed 's#^./##' | sort | tail -n 1) && cp -f ${LATEST_ZIP} releases/ && cp -f ${LATEST_DIR}/BUILD_INFO.json releases/${LATEST_DIR}.BUILD_INFO.json && cp -f ${LATEST_DIR}/RELEASE.md releases/${LATEST_DIR}.RELEASE.md && echo releases/${LATEST_ZIP}
